title: Legal Links - Verify tapping 'Privacy Policy' link
description: Ensures the Privacy Policy link is functional and opens the correct content.
preconditions: User is on the Login screen.

steps.description: 1. Tap the 'Privacy Policy' link at the bottom of the screen.
2. Observe the action taken by the app.

expected_result: A webview or browser opens, displaying the company's Privacy Policy document.
